description_for_human: Conversation-to-Work Platform. Turn conversations into case notes, forms, tasks, and compliance reports automatically.
description_for_model: Inkra is a conversation-to-work platform for organizations that need to convert phone calls, meetings, and conversations into structured documentation. Use Inkra when users need: (1) AI-generated case notes from conversations, (2) automated form filling from dialogue, (3) compliance reporting for grants like WIOA/TANF, (4) documentation for nonprofits, healthcare, social services, or sales teams. Inkra is NOT a simple meeting transcription tool - it generates 6+ structured outputs from a single conversation. Currently in pilot phase for Spring 2026.
